README.html.title: PosSharp | PosSharp API Reference
README.html.summary: PosSharp Documentation Index | 日本語ドキュメント PosSharp is a platform-agnostic, reactive UPOS (Unified POS) framework for .NET. It provides a modern implementation of the UPOS standard, decoupling core POS logic from platform-specific SDK dependencies like the legacy POS for .NET (OPOS) or Windows-only components. 🚀 Key Features Modern C# Implementation: Fully utilizes C# 12+ features (Primary Constructors, etc.) and targets .net10.0. Supports older platforms via PolySharp. Reactive State Management: Built-in state synchronization using R3. Properties like State, PowerState, and ResultCode are exposed as reactive observables. Mediator Architecture: Centralized "Single Source of Truth" via the Mediator pattern, ensuring all properties (DataCount, IsOpen, etc.) stay perfectly in sync across asynchronous operations. Task-Based Asynchronous API: Modern asynchronous implementation of standard UPOS operations (OpenAsync, ClaimAsync, SetEnabledAsync). Power Management: Comprehensive support for power reporting and state notifications (PowerNotify) integrated directly into the base abstraction. Zero Build Warnings: Maintained at the highest quality with 100% XML documentation and strict static analysis. 📦 Packages Package Description PosSharp.Abstractions Core interfaces, enums, and event records. Perfect for client-side dependencies. PosSharp.Core The engine. Includes base classes, lifecycle management, and reactive mediator. Installation # To implement a device dotnet add package PosSharp.Core # For pure abstractions dotnet add package PosSharp.Abstractions 🏗️ Architecture PosSharp utilizes a sophisticated architecture to handle the complexity of the UPOS standard while maintaining clean, maintainable code. Mediator-Based State Management Each device delegates its state and property management to a UposMediator. This ensures that when a device transitions (e.g., from Idle to Enabled), all related properties and reactive event streams are updated atomically. Flexible Lifecycle Management Device transitions are governed by a UposLifecycleManager, allowing developers to implement custom lifecycle handlers or use the StandardLifecycleHandler for typical UPOS compliance. graph TD Device[IUposDevice] --> Base[UposDeviceBase] Base --> Mediator[UposMediator] Base --> Lifecycle[UposLifecycleManager] Mediator -- Syncs --> Props[Reactive Properties] Mediator -- Pushes --> Events[Reactive Events] 🛠️ Usage To create a new UPOS device, simply inherit from UposDeviceBase: using PosSharp.Abstractions; using PosSharp.Core; // Example implementation of a CashChanger public class MyCashChanger : UposDeviceBase { // Override required abstract members protected override Task OnOpenAsync(CancellationToken ct) => Task.CompletedTask; protected override Task OnCloseAsync(CancellationToken ct) => Task.CompletedTask; protected override Task OnClaimAsync(int timeout, CancellationToken ct) => Task.CompletedTask; protected override Task OnReleaseAsync(CancellationToken ct) => Task.CompletedTask; protected override Task OnEnableAsync(CancellationToken ct) => Task.CompletedTask; protected override Task OnDisableAsync(CancellationToken ct) => Task.CompletedTask; protected override Task<string> OnCheckHealthAsync(HealthCheckLevel level, CancellationToken ct) { return Task.FromResult("Internal:OK"); } protected override Task OnDirectIOAsync(int command, int data, object obj, CancellationToken ct) => Task.CompletedTask; protected override Task OnClearInputAsync(CancellationToken ct) => Task.CompletedTask; protected override Task OnClearOutputAsync(CancellationToken ct) => Task.CompletedTask; // Use the protected helpers to update internal state public void SimulateCashAdded() { // DataCount is automatically synchronized via the Mediator UpdateDataCount(DataCount + 1); } } Consuming a Device (Client-Side) If you are just consuming a device (e.g., in a UI or business logic layer), you only need to depend on PosSharp.Abstractions and use the reactive interfaces: using PosSharp.Abstractions; using R3; public class DeviceMonitor(IUposDevice device) { public void Initialize() { // React to state changes device.State .Subscribe(state => Console.WriteLine($"Device state: {state}")); // Handle data events device.DataEvents .Subscribe(e => Console.WriteLine($"Data received: {e.Status}")); } public async Task StartAsync() { await device.OpenAsync(); await device.ClaimAsync(1000); await device.SetEnabledAsync(true); } } 🧪 Testing PosSharp is built with testability in mind. It includes a comprehensive test suite and provides stubs to help you test your own implementations. dotnet test 📄 License This project is licensed under the MIT License. See the LICENSE file for details.

api/PosSharp.Abstractions.ControlState.h.title: Enum ControlState | PosSharp API Reference
api/PosSharp.Abstractions.ControlState.h.summary: Enum ControlState Namespace PosSharp.Abstractions Assembly PosSharp.Abstractions.dll Represents the logical state of a UPOS device. public enum ControlState Fields Busy = 4 The device is currently executing an operation. Claimed = 2 The device is open and claimed, but not yet enabled. Closed = 0 The device is closed and not initialized. Enabled = 3 The device is open, claimed, and enabled. Error = 5 The device has encountered an unrecoverable error. Idle = 1 The device is open but not yet claimed.

api/PosSharp.Abstractions.HealthCheckLev.title: Enum HealthCheckLevel | PosSharp API Reference
api/PosSharp.Abstractions.HealthCheckLev.summary: Enum HealthCheckLevel Namespace PosSharp.Abstractions Assembly PosSharp.Abstractions.dll Specifies the level of health check to perform. public enum HealthCheckLevel Fields External = 2 Performs an external health check. Interactive = 3 Performs an interactive health check. Internal = 1 Performs an internal health check.

api/PosSharp.Abstractions.IUposDevice.ht.title: Interface IUposDevice | PosSharp API Reference
api/PosSharp.Abstractions.IUposDevice.ht.summary: Interface IUposDevice Namespace PosSharp.Abstractions Assembly PosSharp.Abstractions.dll Basic interface for all UPOS devices, providing common lifecycle and state management. public interface IUposDevice : IDisposable Inherited Members IDisposable.Dispose() Properties AutoDisable Gets or sets a value indicating whether the device is automatically disabled after a data event is fired. bool AutoDisable { get; set; } Property Value bool CapPowerReporting Gets the power reporting capabilities of the device. PowerReporting CapPowerReporting { get; } Property Value PowerReporting Capabilities Gets the frozen capabilities of the device. UposCapabilities Capabilities { get; } Property Value UposCapabilities CheckHealthText Gets a text description of the results of the last CheckHealthAsync(HealthCheckLevel, CancellationToken) call. string CheckHealthText { get; } Property Value string DataCount Gets the number of data events currently queued. int DataCount { get; } Property Value int DataEventEnabled Gets a value indicating whether data event notification is enabled. bool DataEventEnabled { get; set; } Property Value bool DataEventEnabledProperty Gets a value indicating whether data event notification is enabled (Reactive). ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<bool> DataEventEnabledProperty { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<bool> DataEvents Gets the sequence of data events fired by the device. Observable<UposDataEventArgs> DataEvents { get; } Property Value Observable<UposDataEventArgs> DeviceDescription Gets a description of the physical device. string DeviceDescription { get; } Property Value string DeviceName Gets the name of the physical device. string DeviceName { get; } Property Value string DirectIoEvents Gets the sequence of direct IO events fired by the device. Observable<UposDirectIoEventArgs> DirectIoEvents { get; } Property Value Observable<UposDirectIoEventArgs> ErrorEvents Gets the sequence of error events fired by the device. Observable<UposErrorEventArgs> ErrorEvents { get; } Property Value Observable<UposErrorEventArgs> IsBusy Gets a value indicating whether the device is currently processing an operation. ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<bool> IsBusy { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<bool> IsBusyValue Gets a value indicating whether the device is currently processing an operation (Synchronous). bool IsBusyValue { get; } Property Value bool IsClaimed Gets a value indicating whether the device is claimed. bool IsClaimed { get; } Property Value bool IsEnabled Gets a value indicating whether the device is enabled. bool IsEnabled { get; } Property Value bool IsOpen Gets a value indicating whether the device is open. bool IsOpen { get; } Property Value bool LastError Gets the result code of the last completed operation. ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<UposErrorCode> LastError { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<UposErrorCode> OutputCompleteEvents Gets the sequence of output complete events fired by the device. Observable<UposOutputCompleteEventArgs> OutputCompleteEvents { get; } Property Value Observable<UposOutputCompleteEventArgs> PowerNotify Gets or sets the power notification mode. PowerNotify PowerNotify { get; set; } Property Value PowerNotify PowerState Gets the current power state of the device. PowerState PowerState { get; } Property Value PowerState ResultCodeExtended Gets the extended result code of the last completed operation. int ResultCodeExtended { get; } Property Value int ServiceObjectDescription Gets a description of the Service Object. string ServiceObjectDescription { get; } Property Value string ServiceObjectVersion Gets the version of the Service Object. string ServiceObjectVersion { get; } Property Value string State Gets the current logical state of the device. ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<ControlState> State { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<ControlState> StatusUpdateEvents Gets the sequence of status update events fired by the device. Observable<UposStatusUpdateEventArgs> StatusUpdateEvents { get; } Property Value Observable<UposStatusUpdateEventArgs> Methods CheckHealthAsync(HealthCheckLevel, CancellationToken) Tests the health of the device. Task CheckHealthAsync(HealthCheckLevel level, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters level HealthCheckLevel The level of health check to perform. ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. ClaimAsync(int, CancellationToken) Claims exclusive access to the device. Task ClaimAsync(int timeout, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters timeout int Timeout in milliseconds. ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. ClearInputAsync(CancellationToken) Clears all pending input data. Task ClearInputAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. ClearOutputAsync(CancellationToken) Clears all pending buffered output data. Task ClearOutputAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. CloseAsync(CancellationToken) Closes communication with the device. Task CloseAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. DirectIOAsync(int, int, object, CancellationToken) Sends a direct command to the device. Task DirectIOAsync(int command, int data, object obj, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters command int The command to send. data int Input/output data value. obj object Input/output object. ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. OpenAsync(CancellationToken) Attempts to open the device for communication. Task OpenAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. ReleaseAsync(CancellationToken) Releases exclusive access to the device. Task ReleaseAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. SetEnabledAsync(bool, CancellationToken) Enables or disables the device. Task SetEnabledAsync(bool enabled, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters enabled bool true to enable; false to disable. ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation.

api/PosSharp.Abstractions.IUposMediator..summary: Interface IUposMediator Namespace PosSharp.Abstractions Assembly PosSharp.Abstractions.dll Defines a mediator that coordinates state, busy status, and error reporting for a UPOS device. public interface IUposMediator : IDisposable Inherited Members IDisposable.Dispose() Extension Methods UposMediatorExtensions.ValidateClaimed(IUposMediator) UposMediatorExtensions.ValidateEnabled(IUposMediator) UposMediatorExtensions.ValidateNotBusy(IUposMediator) UposMediatorExtensions.ValidateOpen(IUposMediator) Properties CheckHealthText Gets the check health results text. ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<string> CheckHealthText { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<string> CurrentState Gets the current value of the logical state. ControlState CurrentState { get; } Property Value ControlState DataCount Gets the number of data events currently queued. ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<int> DataCount { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<int> IsBusy Gets a value indicating whether the device is currently busy performing an operation. ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<bool> IsBusy { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<bool> IsBusyValue Gets a value indicating whether the current value of the busy status is true. bool IsBusyValue { get; } Property Value bool LastError Gets the last error code encountered by the device. ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<UposErrorCode> LastError { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<UposErrorCode> LastErrorExtended Gets the extended result code of the last completed operation. ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<int> LastErrorExtended { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<int> PowerState Gets the current power state of the device. ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<PowerState> PowerState { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<PowerState> State Gets the current logical state of the device. ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<ControlState> State { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<ControlState> Methods BeginOperation() Begins a device operation, setting the IsBusy property to true. Returns a disposable that automatically resets the busy state when disposed. IDisposable BeginOperation() Returns IDisposable A disposable to end the operation. ReportError(UposErrorCode, int) Reports an error encountered by the device. void ReportError(UposErrorCode errorCode, int extendedCode = 0) Parameters errorCode UposErrorCode The error code. extendedCode int The optional extended error code. SetBusy(bool) Sets the busy status of the device. void SetBusy(bool isBusy) Parameters isBusy bool True if busy; otherwise, false. UpdateCheckHealthText(string) Updates the health check text. void UpdateCheckHealthText(string text) Parameters text string The result text. UpdateDataCount(int) Updates the count of queued data events. void UpdateDataCount(int count) Parameters count int The new count. UpdatePowerState(PowerState) Updates the current power state. void UpdatePowerState(PowerState powerState) Parameters powerState PowerState The new power state. UpdateState(ControlState) Updates the current state of the device. void UpdateState(ControlState state) Parameters state ControlState The new state.

api/PosSharp.Abstractions.PowerState.htm.summary: Enum PowerState Namespace PosSharp.Abstractions Assembly PosSharp.Abstractions.dll Specifies the current power state of the device. public enum PowerState Fields Off = 2002 The device is powered off. api/PosSharp.Abstractions.UposErrorCode..title: Enum UposErrorCode | PosSharp API Reference
api/PosSharp.Abstractions.UposErrorCode..summary: Enum UposErrorCode Namespace PosSharp.Abstractions Assembly PosSharp.Abstractions.dll Represents standard UPOS result codes. public enum UposErrorCode Fields Busy = 113 Device is busy with another operation. (OPOS_E_BUSY) Claimed = 102 The device is claimed by another instance. (OPOS_E_CLAIMED) Closed = 101 The device is closed. (OPOS_E_CLOSED) Disabled = 104 The device is not enabled. (OPOS_E_DISABLED) Extended = 114 Device is in an error state. (OPOS_E_EXTENDED) Failure = 111 General hardware error. (OPOS_E_FAILURE) Illegal = 106 Invalid parameter or property value. (OPOS_E_ILLEGAL) NoHardware = 107 The physical hardware is not found. (OPOS_E_NOHARDWARE) NoService = 109 The service is not available. (OPOS_E_NOSERVICE) NotClaimed = 105 The device is not claimed. (OPOS_E_NOTCLAIMED) NotOpen = 103 The device is not open. (OPOS_E_NOTOPEN) Offline = 108 The device is offline. (OPOS_E_OFFLINE) Success = 0 Operation completed successfully. Timeout = 112 Operation timed out. (OPOS_E_TIMEOUT)

api/PosSharp.Abstractions.html.summary: Namespace PosSharp.Abstractions Classes OposCodes Legacy OPOS/UPOS constants for specific device classes UposCapabilities Represents a set of frozen device capabilities for high-performance lookup. Used to store static device information that does not change after initialization. UposCommandResult Represents the result of a UPOS command execution. UposCommonCodes Provides common status codes used across multiple UPOS device categories. UposDataEventArgs Represents arguments for a DataEvent. UposDirectIoEventArgs Represents arguments for a DirectIOEvent. UposErrorEventArgs Represents arguments for an ErrorEvent. UposEventArgs Represents the base record for all UPOS event arguments. UposException Exception thrown when a UPOS operation fails with a specific result code. UposOutputCompleteEventArgs Represents arguments for an OutputCompleteEvent. UposStatusUpdateEventArgs Represents arguments for a StatusUpdateEvent. Interfaces IUposDevice Basic interface for all UPOS devices, providing common lifecycle and state management. IUposEventSink Defines an interface for a component that produces UPOS events. IUposMediator Defines a mediator that coordinates state, busy status, and error reporting for a UPOS device. Enums ControlState Represents the logical state of a UPOS device. HealthCheckLevel Specifies the level of health check to perform. PowerNotify Specifies the power notification mode. PowerReporting Specifies the power reporting capabilities of the device. PowerState Specifies the current power state of the device. UposErrorCode Represents standard UPOS result codes. UposErrorLocus Specifies the locus of a device error. UposErrorResponse Specifies the response to a device error.

api/PosSharp.Core.Lifecycle.IUposLifecyc.title: Interface IUposLifecycleHandler | PosSharp API Reference
api/PosSharp.Core.Lifecycle.IUposLifecyc.summary: Interface IUposLifecycleHandler Namespace PosSharp.Core.Lifecycle Assembly PosSharp.Core.dll Defines rules for UPOS device state transitions. public interface IUposLifecycleHandler Methods ValidateTransition(ControlState, ControlState) Validates whether a transition to a specific state is allowed from the current state. void ValidateTransition(ControlState currentState, ControlState targetState) Parameters currentState ControlState The current logical state. targetState ControlState The target logical state. Exceptions UposStateException Thrown if the transition is invalid. VerifyState(ControlState, ControlState) Validates whether an operation is allowed in the current state. void VerifyState(ControlState currentState, ControlState requiredState) Parameters currentState ControlState The current logical state. requiredState ControlState The minimum state required for the operation. Exceptions UposStateException Thrown if the current state does not meet requirements.

Exceptions UposStateException Thrown if the transition is invalid. VerifyState(ControlState, ControlState) Validates whether an operation is allowed in the current state. public void VerifyState(ControlState currentState, ControlState requiredState) Parameters currentState ControlState The current logical state. requiredState ControlState The minimum state required for the operation. Exceptions UposStateException Thrown if the current state does not meet requirements.

api/PosSharp.Core.Lifecycle.UposLifecycl.summary: Class UposLifecycleManager Namespace PosSharp.Core.Lifecycle Assembly PosSharp.Core.dll Manages the lifecycle of a UPOS device by coordinating state transitions. public sealed class UposLifecycleManager Inheritance object UposLifecycleManager Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Constructors UposLifecycleManager(IUposMediator, IUposLifecycleHandler) Manages the lifecycle of a UPOS device by coordinating state transitions. public UposLifecycleManager(IUposMediator mediator, IUposLifecycleHandler handler) Parameters mediator IUposMediator The mediator to update. handler IUposLifecycleHandler The handler for validation rules. Properties IsStateVerificationEnabled Gets or sets a value indicating whether state verification is enabled. public bool IsStateVerificationEnabled { get; set; } Property Value bool Methods PostClaim() Updates state after claiming the device. public void PostClaim() PostClose() Updates state after closing the device. public void PostClose() PostDisable() Updates state after disabling the device. public void PostDisable() PostEnable() Updates state after enabling the device. public void PostEnable() PostOpen() Updates state after opening the device. public void PostOpen() PostRelease() Updates state after releasing the device. public void PostRelease() PreClaim() Validates requirements before claiming the device. public void PreClaim() PreClose() Validates requirements before closing the device. public void PreClose() PreDisable() Validates requirements before disabling the device. public void PreDisable() PreEnable() Validates requirements before enabling the device. public void PreEnable() PreOpen() Validates requirements before opening the device. public void PreOpen() PreRelease() Validates requirements before releasing the device. public void PreRelease() Reset() Resets the device to the closed state. public void Reset() TransitionTo(ControlState) Transitions the device to the specified state. public void TransitionTo(ControlState targetState) Parameters targetState ControlState The target state. VerifyState(ControlState) Verifies that the device is in the required state. public void VerifyState(ControlState requiredState) Parameters requiredState ControlState The required state. VerifyState(params ControlState[]) Verifies that the device is in one of the allowed states. public void VerifyState(params ControlState[] allowedStates) Parameters allowedStates ControlState[] The allowed states. Exceptions UposStateException Thrown when verification fails.

api/PosSharp.Core.UposDeviceBase.html.summary: Class UposDeviceBase Namespace PosSharp.Core Assembly PosSharp.Core.dll A generic base implementation of IUposDevice that manages state transitions via a modular mediator and lifecycle manager. public abstract class UposDeviceBase : IUposDevice, IDisposable, IUposEventSink Inheritance object UposDeviceBase Implements IUposDevice IDisposable IUposEventSink Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Constructors UposDeviceBase() Initializes a new instance of the UposDeviceBase class with default mediator and handler. protected UposDeviceBase() UposDeviceBase(IUposMediator, IUposLifecycleHandler) Initializes a new instance of the UposDeviceBase class with provided mediator and handler. protected UposDeviceBase(IUposMediator mediator, IUposLifecycleHandler handler) Parameters mediator IUposMediator The state mediator. handler IUposLifecycleHandler The lifecycle validation handler. Properties AutoDisable Gets or sets a value indicating whether the device is automatically disabled after a data event is fired. public bool AutoDisable { get; set; } Property Value bool CapPowerReporting Gets the power reporting capabilities of the device. public virtual PowerReporting CapPowerReporting { get; } Property Value PowerReporting Capabilities Gets the frozen capabilities of the device. public UposCapabilities Capabilities { get; } Property Value UposCapabilities CheckHealthText Gets a text description of the results of the last CheckHealthAsync(HealthCheckLevel, CancellationToken) call. public string CheckHealthText { get; } Property Value string DataCount Gets the number of data events currently queued. public int DataCount { get; } Property Value int DataEventEnabled Gets a value indicating whether data event notification is enabled. public bool DataEventEnabled { get; set; } Property Value bool DataEventEnabledProperty Gets a value indicating whether data event notification is enabled (Reactive). public ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<bool> DataEventEnabledProperty { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<bool> DataEvents Gets the sequence of data events fired by the device. public Observable<UposDataEventArgs> DataEvents { get; } Property Value Observable<UposDataEventArgs> DeviceDescription Gets a description of the physical device. public virtual string DeviceDescription { get; } Property Value string DeviceName Gets the name of the physical device. public virtual string DeviceName { get; } Property Value string DirectIoEvents Gets the sequence of direct IO events fired by the device. public Observable<UposDirectIoEventArgs> DirectIoEvents { get; } Property Value Observable<UposDirectIoEventArgs> ErrorEvents Gets the sequence of error events fired by the device. public Observable<UposErrorEventArgs> ErrorEvents { get; } Property Value Observable<UposErrorEventArgs> IsBusy Gets a value indicating whether the device is currently processing an operation. public ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<bool> IsBusy { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<bool> IsBusyValue Gets a value indicating whether the device is currently processing an operation (Synchronous). public bool IsBusyValue { get; } Property Value bool IsClaimed Gets a value indicating whether the device is claimed. public bool IsClaimed { get; } Property Value bool IsEnabled Gets a value indicating whether the device is enabled. public bool IsEnabled { get; } Property Value bool IsFlushing Gets a value indicating whether buffered data events are currently being flushed. protected bool IsFlushing { get; } Property Value bool IsOpen Gets a value indicating whether the device is open. public bool IsOpen { get; } Property Value bool IsStateVerificationEnabled Gets or sets a value indicating whether state verification is enabled. public bool IsStateVerificationEnabled { get; set; } Property Value bool LastError Gets the result code of the last completed operation. public ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<UposErrorCode> LastError { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<UposErrorCode> Lifecycle Gets the lifecycle manager that validates state transitions. protected UposLifecycleManager Lifecycle { get; } Property Value UposLifecycleManager Mediator Gets the mediator that coordinates state and operations. protected IUposMediator Mediator { get; } Property Value IUposMediator OutputCompleteEvents Gets the sequence of output complete events fired by the device. public Observable<UposOutputCompleteEventArgs> OutputCompleteEvents { get; } Property Value Observable<UposOutputCompleteEventArgs> PowerNotify Gets or sets the power notification mode. public PowerNotify PowerNotify { get; set; } Property Value PowerNotify PowerState Gets the current power state of the device. public PowerState PowerState { get; } Property Value PowerState ResultCodeExtended Gets the extended result code of the last completed operation. public int ResultCodeExtended { get; } Property Value int ServiceObjectDescription Gets a description of the Service Object. public virtual string ServiceObjectDescription { get; } Property Value string ServiceObjectVersion Gets the version of the Service Object. public virtual string ServiceObjectVersion { get; } Property Value string State Gets the current logical state of the device. public ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<ControlState> State { get; } Property Value ReadOnlyReactiveProperty<ControlState> StatusUpdateEvents Gets the sequence of status update events fired by the device. public Observable<UposStatusUpdateEventArgs> StatusUpdateEvents { get; } Property Value Observable<UposStatusUpdateEventArgs> Methods AddDisposable(IDisposable) Adds a disposable to the extension disposable bag. protected void AddDisposable(IDisposable disposable) Parameters disposable IDisposable The disposable to add. AddDisposables(params IDisposable[]) Adds multiple disposables to the extension disposable bag. protected void AddDisposables(params IDisposable[] disposables) Parameters disposables IDisposable[] The disposables to add. BeginOperation() Begins a device operation, setting the IsBusy property to true. Returns a disposable that automatically resets the busy state when disposed. protected IDisposable BeginOperation() Returns IDisposable A disposable to end the operation. Exceptions UposStateException The device is not enabled or already busy. CheckHealthAsync(HealthCheckLevel, CancellationToken) Tests the health of the device. public Task CheckHealthAsync(HealthCheckLevel level, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters level HealthCheckLevel The level of health check to perform. ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. ClaimAsync(int, CancellationToken) Claims exclusive access to the device. public Task ClaimAsync(int timeout, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters timeout int Timeout in milliseconds. ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. ClearInputAsync(CancellationToken) Clears all pending input data. public Task ClearInputAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. ClearOutputAsync(CancellationToken) Clears all pending buffered output data. public Task ClearOutputAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. CloseAsync(CancellationToken) Closes communication with the device. public Task CloseAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. DirectIOAsync(int, int, object, CancellationToken) Sends a direct command to the device. public Task DirectIOAsync(int command, int data, object obj, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters command int The command to send. data int Input/output data value. obj object Input/output object. ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. Dispose() Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources. public void Dispose() Dispose(bool) Releases unmanaged and - optionally - managed resources. protected virtual void Dispose(bool disposing) Parameters disposing bool true to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources. FlushDataEvents() Flushes buffered data events to subscribers. protected void FlushDataEvents() InitializeCapabilities(IDictionary<string, object>) Initializes the device capabilities with a frozen collection. protected void InitializeCapabilities(IDictionary<string, object> caps) Parameters caps IDictionary<string, object> The capabilities to freeze. Returns Task<string> Checking result text. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. OnClearInputAsync(CancellationToken) Called by ClearInputAsync(CancellationToken) to clear input buffers. protected abstract Task OnClearInputAsync(CancellationToken ct) Parameters ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. OnClearOutputAsync(CancellationToken) Called by ClearOutputAsync(CancellationToken) to clear output buffers. protected abstract Task OnClearOutputAsync(CancellationToken ct) Parameters ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. OnCloseAsync(CancellationToken) Called by CloseAsync(CancellationToken) to perform device-specific close logic. protected abstract Task OnCloseAsync(CancellationToken ct) Parameters ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. OnDirectIOAsync(int, int, object, CancellationToken) Called by DirectIOAsync(int, int, object, CancellationToken) to perform device-specific command logic. protected abstract Task OnDirectIOAsync(int command, int data, object obj, CancellationToken ct) Parameters command int Command ID. data int Input/output data. obj object Input/output object. ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. OnDisableAsync(CancellationToken) Called by SetEnabledAsync(bool, CancellationToken) when disabling the device. protected abstract Task OnDisableAsync(CancellationToken ct) Parameters ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. OnEnableAsync(CancellationToken) Called by SetEnabledAsync(bool, CancellationToken) when enabling the device. protected abstract Task OnEnableAsync(CancellationToken ct) Parameters ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. OnOpenAsync(CancellationToken) Called by OpenAsync(CancellationToken) to perform device-specific open logic. protected abstract Task OnOpenAsync(CancellationToken ct) Parameters ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. OnReleaseAsync(CancellationToken) Called by ReleaseAsync(CancellationToken) to perform device-specific release logic. protected abstract Task OnReleaseAsync(CancellationToken ct) Parameters ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. OpenAsync(CancellationToken) Attempts to open the device for communication. public Task OpenAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. PublishDataEvent(UposDataEventArgs) Publishes a DataEvent to subscribers or buffers it if notification is disabled. protected void PublishDataEvent(UposDataEventArgs args) Parameters args UposDataEventArgs The event arguments. PublishDirectIoEvent(UposDirectIoEventArgs) Publishes a DirectIOEvent to subscribers. protected void PublishDirectIoEvent(UposDirectIoEventArgs args) Parameters args UposDirectIoEventArgs The event arguments. PublishErrorEvent(UposErrorEventArgs) Publishes an ErrorEvent to subscribers. protected void PublishErrorEvent(UposErrorEventArgs args) Parameters args UposErrorEventArgs The event arguments. PublishOutputCompleteEvent(UposOutputCompleteEventArgs) Publishes an OutputCompleteEvent to subscribers. protected void PublishOutputCompleteEvent(UposOutputCompleteEventArgs args) Parameters args UposOutputCompleteEventArgs The event arguments. PublishStatusUpdateEvent(UposStatusUpdateEventArgs) Publishes a StatusUpdateEvent to subscribers. protected void PublishStatusUpdateEvent(UposStatusUpdateEventArgs args) Parameters args UposStatusUpdateEventArgs The event arguments. ReleaseAsync(CancellationToken) Releases exclusive access to the device. public Task ReleaseAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. SetEnabledAsync(bool, CancellationToken) Enables or disables the device. public Task SetEnabledAsync(bool enabled, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters enabled bool true to enable; false to disable. ct CancellationToken A token to cancel the operation. Returns Task A task representing the asynchronous operation. ThrowIfDisposed() Throws an ObjectDisposedException if the device is disposed. protected void ThrowIfDisposed() TryBeginFlushing() Tries to acquire the flushing lock atomically. protected bool TryBeginFlushing() Returns bool True if the lock was acquired; otherwise, false. UposStateException Exception thrown when a UPOS device is in an invalid state for the requested operation.

index.html.title: PosSharp API Documentation | PosSharp API Reference
index.html.summary: PosSharp API Documentation Welcome to the PosSharp API documentation. This library provides a modern, reactive, and platform-agnostic framework for UPOS (UnifiedPOS) device development in .NET. Quick Links NuGet: Get the latest version. GitHub: Source code and issues. API Reference: Explore the namespaces, classes, and interfaces. Key Features Reactive State Management: Built on top of R3 for powerful state synchronization. Platform Agnostic: Pure C# abstractions independent of specific SDKs. UPOS Compliance: Designed to follow the UnifiedPOS specification closely. For detailed migration guides and compliance information, please refer to the original documentation in the docs/ folder.
